seo.descriptionSeo: Citação de Amish Tripathi sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Nobody is good or bad. They are either strong or weak. Strong people stick to their morals,…

frase_original: Nobody is good or bad. They are either strong or weak. Strong people stick to their morals, no matter what the trials and tribulations. Weak people, many a times, do not even realise how low they have fallen.

texto: If you want something from someone, you have to give that person something they want.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Amish Tripathi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “If you want something from someone, you have to give that person something they want.” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, self-improvement, something, útil em momentos de reflexao.

texto: If the universe is trying to maintain balance, we must aid this by ensuring that Good is not enjoyed excessively. Or else the universe will re-balance itself by creating Evil to counteract Good. That is the purpose of Evil: it balances the Good.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Amish Tripathi sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “If the universe is trying to maintain balance, we must aid this by ensuring that Good is not enjo…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, balance, good-and-evil, útil em momentos de good-and-evil e sabedoria.

frase_original: If the universe is trying to maintain balance, we must aid this by ensuring that Good is not enjoyed excessively. Or else the universe will re-balance itself by creating Evil to counteract Good. That is the purpose of Evil: it balances the Good.

texto: At the outset, I think that one should be natural, not just when it comes to writing but in every area of life. If you try to be something that you are not just to impress others, then it's a rather sad life.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Amish Tripathi sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida.
